templates.prompt: Plane den kompletten Feature-Entwicklungs-Workflow fuer {feature}. Phasen: Discovery, Design, Implement, Test, Review, Deploy, Monitor.
templates.name: Feature Development

templates.prompt: Erstelle einen Bug-Fix Workflow fuer {bug}. Steps: Reproduce, Root Cause, Fix, Test, Regression Check, Deploy Hotfix, Post-Mortem.
templates.name: Bug Fix Pipeline

templates.prompt: Erstelle einen Content-Publishing Workflow fuer {content_typ}. Steps: Ideation, Draft, Review, SEO, Design, Publish, Distribute, Analyze.
templates.name: Content Publishing

templates.prompt: Erstelle einen Onboarding-Workflow fuer {rolle}. Tag 1-30 Plan, Checkliste, Mentoring, Tools Setup, Erste Aufgaben, Feedback-Loops.
templates.name: Onboarding Prozess

templates.prompt: Erstelle einen Incident Response Workflow fuer {system}. Severity Levels, Eskalation, Communication, Mitigation, Root Cause, Prevention.
templates.name: Incident Response

templates.prompt: Definiere einen Code Review Workflow. PR Checklist, Review Kriterien (Security/Performance/Style), Approval Rules, Merge Strategie.
templates.name: Code Review Prozess

templates.prompt: Erstelle einen Release Workflow fuer {projekt}. Versionierung (SemVer), Changelog, Feature Freeze, RC Testing, Rollout, Rollback Plan.
templates.name: Release Management

templates.prompt: Erstelle eine Data Pipeline fuer {datenquelle}. Extract, Transform, Load (ETL), Validation, Scheduling, Monitoring, Error Recovery.
templates.name: Data Pipeline

templates.prompt: Erstelle einen A/B Testing Workflow fuer {feature}. Hypothese, Metriken, Sample Size, Implementation, Analysis, Decision Framework.
templates.name: A/B Test Ablauf

templates.prompt: Erstelle einen Security Audit Workflow fuer {system}. OWASP Top 10, Dependency Scan, Penetration Test, Report, Remediation, Re-Test.
templates.name: Security Audit

templates.prompt: Plane eine Migration von {alt} nach {neu}. Assessment, Mapping, Pilot, Batch Migration, Validation, Cutover, Rollback, Cleanup.
templates.name: Migration Strategie

templates.prompt: Erstelle einen Backup-Workflow fuer {system}. Backup-Typen (Full/Incremental/Diff), Schedule, Retention, Test-Restore, Monitoring.
templates.name: Backup und Recovery

templates.prompt: Erstelle einen Sprint Planning Workflow fuer {team}. Backlog Grooming, Story Points, Capacity Planning, Sprint Goal, DoD, Retrospektive.
templates.name: Sprint Planning

templates.prompt: Erstelle einen API Design Workflow. Requirements, Schema Design, Mocking, Implementation, Documentation, Testing, Versioning.
templates.name: API Design Prozess

templates.prompt: Erstelle einen Monitoring Setup Workflow fuer {service}. Metriken, Alerts, Dashboards, Log Aggregation, Uptime Checks, On-Call Rotation.
templates.name: Monitoring Setup

templates.prompt: Plane einen Documentation Sprint. Audit bestehende Docs, Luecken identifizieren, Templates erstellen, Schreiben, Review, Publish.
templates.name: Documentation Sprint

templates.prompt: Erstelle einen Refactoring-Plan fuer {modul}. Code Smells identifizieren, Impact Analysis, Schrittweiser Plan, Tests sichern, Metriken.
templates.name: Refactoring Plan

templates.prompt: Erstelle einen Load Testing Workflow fuer {api}. Baseline, Ramp-Up, Spike Test, Soak Test, Ergebnis-Analyse, Optimierung.
templates.name: Load Test Ablauf

templates.prompt: Plane den Rollout eines Design Systems fuer {projekt}. Tokens, Components, Documentation, Migration Guide, Training, Adoption Tracking.
templates.name: Design System Rollout

templates.prompt: Erstelle eine Automatisierungs-Pipeline fuer {prozess}. Trigger, Conditions, Actions, Error Handling, Logging, Scheduling, Notification.
templates.name: Automation Pipeline
